---
output: 
  html_document:
    css: custom_styles.css
---

#### Customizing ggplot
<details open><summary class = 'drop'>Load and prep data</summary>
For this section, we're going to use NETN water chemistry data to customize ggplots objects.



</details>
<br>
<details open><summary class = 'drop'>Palettes</summary>

</details>
<br>



<details open><summary class = 'drop'>Facets and grids</summary>

</details>
<br>



<details open><summary class = 'drop'>Legends</summary>

</details>
<br>
